news.title: openclaw 2026.4.15
news.summary:
### Changes

- Anthropic/models: default Anthropic selections, `opus` aliases, Claude CLI defaults, and bundled image understanding to Claude Opus 4.7.
- Google/TTS: add Gemini text-to-speech support to the bundled `google` plugin, including provider registration, voice selection, WAV reply output,

news.title: openclaw 2026.4.15-beta.2
news.summary:
### Changes

- Anthropic/models: default Anthropic selections, `opus` aliases, Claude CLI defaults, and bundled image understanding to Claude Opus 4.7.
- Google/TTS: add Gemini text-to-speech support to the bundled `google` plugin, including provider registration, voice selection, WAV reply output,

news.title: OpenClaw 2026.4.15-beta.1
news.summary:
### Changes

- Control UI/Overview: add a Model Auth status card showing OAuth token health and provider rate-limit pressure at a glance, with attention callouts when OAuth tokens are expiring or expired. Backed by a new `models.authStatus` gateway method that strips credentials and caches for 60s.

news.title: openclaw 2026.4.14
news.summary:
OpenClaw `2026.4.14` is another broad quality release focused on model provider with explicit turn improvements for GPT-5 family and channel provider issues. Additionally we improved overal performance with refactors to our underlying core codebase.

## Changes

- OpenAI Codex/models: add forwar

news.title: openclaw 2026.4.14-beta.1
news.summary:
### Changes

- Telegram/forum topics: surface human topic names in agent context, prompt metadata, and plugin hook metadata by learning names from Telegram forum service messages. (#65973) Thanks @ptahdunbar.

### Fixes

- UI/chat: replace marked.js with markdown-it so maliciously crafted markdown
